fields.acceptance_criteria: New Rust/Leptos crate providing: Layout (header/sidebar/main/panel), TreeView/FileTree, TabBar, CodeViewer, ResizeHandle, WgpuOverlay (full-page GPU canvas), ThemeSettings, ThemeColors/EffectSettings reactive system; all three viewer apps depend on this crate; GPU shaders reused from TS frontend via include_str
fields.title: Arch: Extract viewer-api-leptos shared crate for all Leptos viewers

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. New library crate at tools/viewer/viewer-api/frontend-leptos/ targeting wasm32-unknown-unknown. 2. Modules: pub mod layout (Layout, Header, Sidebar, TabBar), pub mod components (TreeView, ResizeHandle, CodeViewer, FileContentViewer, ThemeSettings, icons), pub mod gpu (WgpuOverlay, render loop, uniforms, palette), pub mod theme (ThemeColors, EffectSettings, preset loading, CSS injection). 3. Feature flags: gpu (WgpuOverlay + render pipeline), syntect (CodeViewer syntax highlighting) — both optional, heavy WASM dependencies gated. 4. Frontend-only — no backend/Axum code. Viewer backends depend on existing viewer-api crate. 5. log-viewer-leptos refactored to depend on viewer-api-leptos, removing duplicated code. 6. All components reusable: doc-viewer-leptos and ticket-viewer-leptos can depend on same crate. 7. Theme preset loading fetches from backend API (not compiled into WASM).
fields.interview_answers: Q1: Location tools/viewer/viewer-api/frontend-leptos/ confirmed — mirrors TS structure. Q2: Frontend-only crate. Each viewer backend depends on the existing viewer-api Rust crate directly for backend utilities. Q3: Yes, use Cargo feature flags — gpu feature for WgpuOverlay, syntect feature for CodeViewer highlighting, so viewers can opt out of heavy modules.
fields.title: Arch: Extract viewer-api-leptos shared crate for all Leptos viewers
